tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read file content with line range and byte limits.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search source files with query and optional include glob.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Return workspace git diff (staged or unstaged).

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a new file (or overwrite when explicitly allowed).

tools.name: execute_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command in workspace root when explicitly enabled.
